products.name: Parking and Curb Operations Platform

interfaces.name: Operator Control Console
interfaces.description: Primary workspace for parking configuration, tariffs, permits, enforcement oversight, and zone performance.

interfaces.name: Parking KPI Cockpit
interfaces.description: Executive and operational dashboards for occupancy, revenue, compliance, and payment-channel performance.

interfaces.name: Parking Operations API
interfaces.description: Controlled API surface for partner apps, hardware, and operator-system connectivity.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Controls the operating model for tariffs, zones, permits, and exemptions.
Links demand and utilization signals back to operator pricing choices.
Keeps mobile, kiosk, in-car, and partner-originated payments coherent.
Supports permit, barrier, and LPR-heavy access models across parking assets.
Turns policy into operationally governed compliance workflows.
Creates the decision layer for asset performance and issue resolution.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from parking-operator governance, revenue, and compliance needs.

products.name: City Mobility Intelligence

interfaces.name: City Mobility Insight Board
interfaces.description: Cross-domain planning and KPI workspace for city mobility, curb, and policy decisions.

interfaces.name: Mobility Intelligence Data API
interfaces.description: Data access layer for city reporting, planning tools, and shared operational analysis.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the cross-domain mobility data foundation required by city planners.
Turns data into policy options and expected outcome models.
Makes policy and operations reporting trusted enough for real decisions.
Allows the product to aggregate municipal and operator systems without rip-and-replace.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from city-planning, policy, and evidence-accountability needs.

products.name: Transit Payments and Revenue Operations

interfaces.name: Transit Operations Console
interfaces.description: Back-office workspace for fare rules, payment exceptions, device incidents, and network operations.

interfaces.name: Validator and Driver Device Estate
interfaces.description: Field device surface covering validation, payment, and fare operations.

interfaces.name: Transit Revenue Board
interfaces.description: Operational reporting for fare capture, exception handling, and device uptime.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Runs open payment and fare logic across transport journeys.
Controls the operational estate that keeps fare collection live in the field.
Consolidates transaction, alert, and device data into one transport operations model.
Provides the financial trust layer for transit payments and exceptions.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from open-payment transport operations, revenue capture, and field reliability needs.

products.name: Fleet and Business Mobility Hub

interfaces.name: Business Mobility Portal
interfaces.description: Admin workspace for employee, visitor, and fleet parking policy plus account and billing control.

interfaces.name: Driver and Employee Parking App
interfaces.description: Mobile self-service for employees, visitors, and field drivers to access or manage parking.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Allows each business account to define who may park, where, and under what budget or policy.
Centralizes invoicing and spend allocation across users, vehicles, and business units.
Covers guest, contractor, and short-term parking cases without manual administration.
Ensures fleet and business parking flows work consistently across channels and markets.
Keeps business billing and partner settlement aligned with usage.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from fleet administration, cost control, and user self-service needs.

products.name: Mobility Partner Exchange

interfaces.name: Partner APIs and SDKs
interfaces.description: Integration surface for parking, transit, and adjacent mobility inventory.

interfaces.name: Partner Workspace
interfaces.description: Portal for certification, market onboarding, rule review, and commercial visibility.

interfaces.name: Partner Performance Board
interfaces.description: Operational and commercial reporting across transaction success, attach, and settlement.

neededCapabilities.whyNeeded: Provides the reusable technical and operational model for ecosystem integrations.
Makes market availability and rule differences explicit enough for scalable onboarding.
Shows whether the integration creates enough value to keep expanding.
Keeps multi-party transactions auditable and monetizable.
Extends the partner platform into OEM, navigation, and in-car mobility surfaces.

products.neededCapabilitiesMappingNote: Capabilities are inferred from partner onboarding speed, transaction economics, and ecosystem expansion needs.
